Tests the behavior of adding 1 to Infinity in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple test assertion that checks the behavior of arithmetic operations involving the `Infinity` value in JavaScript. It verifies that adding `1` to `Infinity` results in `Infinity`, which is consistent with the mathematical properties of infinity. This assertion is useful for ensuring that the JavaScript environment correctly handles operations with `Infinity`, which is a special numeric value representing an unbounded quantity. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing specifically on this arithmetic behavior.
